title: Growth Gateway: Guide to inclusive investing in Africa
body: "This guide, produced by Boston Consulting Group for the UK Growth Gateway programme, explores how investors can increase inclusive growth in Africa’s booming tech sector by backing women-led and women-centric businesses.  The guide highlights systemic barriers that limit funding for female founders and presents actionable insights into 4 high-potential sub-sectors: fintech, healthtech, retailtech and edtech – across main African markets.  Designed for UK and global investors, the report combines market analysis with gender-lens investment strategies to help close a $2.5 billion funding gap and capture outsized returns while advancing women’s economic empowerment.   Find out more about Growth Gateway.  "
